title: Endless Survival
description: Modpack created for exploration enthusiasts and adventurers. Created for a private Server. No ongoing support guaranteed.
body:
Version 1:
Bigger Modpack with lots of Expansions

Version 2 (Current):
A More Vanilla Based approach with several QoL Addons like Waystones, Easy Enchant, many more and Performance Optimizations

The Modpack comes with preinstalled shaderpacks and resourcepack addons in vanilla style. You could still install one yourself if you want.

All thanks go to the creator of the Mods.
